name: Milk Chocolate Florentine Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 package NESTLE Toll House milk chocolate morsels (11.5 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Melt butter in a medium saucepan over low heat. Remove from heat and stir in oats, sugar, flour, corn syrup, milk, vanilla extract, and salt until well combined.
3. Drop the mixture by spoonfuls onto foil-lined cookie sheets, spacing them about 3 inches apart.
4. Bake for 5-7 minutes. Allow to cool on the cookie sheets.
5. Peel away the foil from the cookies.
6. Melt NESTLE Toll House milk chocolate morsels over hot (not boiling) water until smooth.
7. Spread melted chocolate onto one half of the cooled cookies, then top with the remaining cookies.
8. Makes 3 1/2 dozen sandwich cookies.
